Hi Rebel! Welcome to Beyond BARS Coaching!

Support alcohol-free women—especially those who are system-impacted—in rebuilding safety, self-trust, and stability through trauma-informed coaching, nervous-system education, and community connection.

Fill Out Registration Form 💛 Choose Your Impact

Our Mission

Sustainable sobriety and successful reentry are not created through willpower or punishment, but through structure, safety, and support.

Beyond BARS Coaching is the framework. The Sober Rebel Club is the community. Together, they create a continuum of care for system-impacted women navigating major life transitions.

👋 Hello, I'm Vanessa

I'm Vanessa Ragains, and I've been sober since December 9, 2020. I lived in group homes from ages 13–17 and experienced homelessness—experiences that shaped everything about my mission to help system-impacted women navigate major life transitions.

As a certified Health & Life Coach, Herbalist, and Registered Yoga Teacher (RYT-500), I bring over two decades of holistic practice to every coaching relationship. I retired from my Massage Therapy career and poured all of that knowledge into this work.

Learn About The Program

🧠 What You'll Learn

🎯

Clarify Your Goals

Receive a personalized, step-by-step Sober Rebel Plan that integrates your education and career journey, while maintaining a strong, authentic LinkedIn profile that reflects your growth and goals.

🏛️

Honor the 3 Pillars

You'll build supportive goals across Nourishment, Self-Care, and Personal Development—the three pillars that ground our work and create sustainable progress.

🧘

Cultivate Healthy Mobility

Through a thoughtful blend of herbal wellness and trauma-informed yoga, you'll develop a mobility practice that restores movement, supports nervous-system regulation, and helps your body feel safer, steadier, and more resilient.

🧩 The F.A.S.T. Method

Healing happens through safety + repetition, not pressure.

F

Foundation

Nervous-system safety and daily rhythms that create stability.

A

Accountability

Supportive structure and reflective practices to keep you on track.

S

Support

Trauma-informed coaching and peer connection that meets you where you are.

T

Tools

Practical, repeatable practices you can reach for in any moment.
